description: Declarative manifest of recurring jobs that keep the detection_scanner corpus current. A future operator (or a scheduled run) consumes this to resume work without re-deriving the cadence. Prose elaboration lives in RUNBOOK.md.

tasks.name: Canvas Unit 42 + MITRE for new content
outputs: Updated sources/unit42-index.json with new P0/P1/P2 entries
Optionally: new draft TTPs in ttps/_drafts/
steps: Pull RSS for SRC-UNIT42 and any other Tier-1 feed.
For each new article in last 7 days, classify P0/P1/P2 by themes in unit42-index.json.groups.
Add URL + title + themes + actor aliases to the relevant group.
If P0 and clearly actionable, open a draft TTP in ttps/_drafts/.
Run scripts/validate.py and scripts/build-manifest.py; commit.
tasks.definition_of_done: All new Tier-1 posts from the prior week are either indexed (sources/) or drafted (ttps/_drafts/) and validator passes.

tasks.name: Validate corpus + refresh manifest
steps: python3 scripts/validate.py
python3 scripts/build-manifest.py
git diff --exit-code manifest.json  # CI gate
commit any manifest drift
tasks.definition_of_done: Validator returns 0 failures and manifest.json is in sync with corpus.

tasks.name: Canvas Tier 2 + 3 sources
outputs: New source-specific index files (e.g., sources/mandiant-index.json) for any source where backlog grows
steps: For each Tier-2 source, run its discovery_queries (substituting current scope_seeds).
For each Tier-3 government source, pull last month's advisories.
Cross-reference actor naming aliases before treating two reports as distinct.
Update last_canvassed.
tasks.definition_of_done: All Tier-2/3 sources show last_canvassed within the last 30 days.

tasks.name: Promote draft TTPs to active
steps: For each draft, enrich Cortex-specific fields (IOCs, BIOCs, panw_mapping, use_cases, success_criteria).
Validate against schema.
If draft references a new source not yet in registry, add it.
Move file out of _drafts/, flip status to active, commit.
tasks.definition_of_done: ttps/_drafts/ holds only entries needing human enrichment that didn't fit this cycle.

tasks.name: Re-test BlackSuit-Blitz chained scenario in lab
outputs: Lab run report; any BIOC/XQL adjustments committed
steps: Run TTP-0002 (LSASS) → 0004 (DCSync) → 0005 (rclone) → 0006 (ESXi safe-mode) sequentially in lab.
Confirm correlation rules CR-CRED-0003, CR-EXFIL-0001, CR-RANSOM-0001, CR-RANSOM-0002 fire.
If any BIOC fails, update the TTP entry and bump entry_version + add changelog entry.
tasks.definition_of_done: Full chain produces one P1 XSIAM incident; all per-test success_criteria pass.

tasks.name: Schema + product enum review
outputs: Updated schema with bumped version; migrated entries
steps: Review whether current corpus stresses the schema in unanticipated ways.
Update panw_mapping.products.module enum for new SKUs / retired ones.
If breaking change: bump schema_version const, migrate all entries, update validator if needed.
Re-validate + rebuild manifest.

tasks.name: MITRE ATT&CK version bump
outputs: Updated TTP entries; possible new schema enum entries
steps: Pull latest MITRE STIX bundle.
Cross-check all technique_id / subtechnique_id / tactic_id values in corpus resolve.
Flag any deprecated/renamed techniques; update affected TTP entries.

tasks.name: Author TTP from breaking Unit 42 post
tasks.trigger: Unit 42 publishes a high-signal post about a current actor, campaign, or zero-day in active exploitation
steps: Add URL to sources/unit42-index.json with P0.
Author the TTP directly (skip scraper drafting).
Walk the 12-step 'How to add a new TTP' workflow in RUNBOOK.md.
If the post implies a chained scenario, decompose into multiple TTPs and add correlation rules linking them.

backlog.description: Next-up TTPs to author from the indexed Unit 42 P0 set. Drained by T-ADHOC-001 or T-MONTHLY-002.

items.topic: Phantom Taurus IIS web shell + NET-STAR malware
Payroll Pirates BEC and payroll redirect

tasks_completed: Decomposed BlackSuit-Blitz chain into TTPs 0002 + 0004 + 0005 + 0006 with correlation rules
deferred: Cortex-scraper handoff contract (waiting on scraper repo access)
BIOC dialect freeze against live XSIAM 2.x tenant
Real PANW rule IDs (currently placeholder; backfill as POVs surface them)
